# Topic Combination Matrix

Use this reference when one file is not enough and the answer needs a fuller social slice.

## Core Rule

Most strong answers in this skill should combine multiple files.

## Common Combinations

### First-Class System Topic Routing

Start with:
- [first-class-system-topics.md](first-class-system-topics.md)

Usually pair with:
- the primary topic file
- one adjacent institution or power file
- one public-surface or public-life file
- [game-translation.md](game-translation.md)
- [module-mapping.md](module-mapping.md)

Use when:
- the user asks about any major topic in the skill as part of the real game world and you should not leave it as an isolated leaf answer

### Full Living-World Chain

Start with:
- [full-skill-orchestration.md](full-skill-orchestration.md)

Usually pair with:
- [late-imperial-pack.md](late-imperial-pack.md)
- one region pack such as [jiangnan-water-network-county.md](jiangnan-water-network-county.md) or [north-china-road-county.md](north-china-road-county.md)
- [lineage-institutions-corporate-power.md](lineage-institutions-corporate-power.md)
- [commoner-livelihoods.md](commoner-livelihoods.md)
- [imperial-power-bureaucracy-and-subjects.md](imperial-power-bureaucracy-and-subjects.md)
- [public-opinion-reputation-public-spaces.md](public-opinion-reputation-public-spaces.md)
- [game-translation.md](game-translation.md)
- [module-mapping.md](module-mapping.md)

Use when:
- the user wants the whole skill connected into one living county-world chain rather than one isolated topic slice

### Conflict Scale and Resolution Ladder

Start with:
- [conflict-scale-ladder.md](conflict-scale-ladder.md)

Usually pair with:
- [ancient-sandbox.md](ancient-sandbox.md)
- [lineage-private-force-retainers-conflict.md](lineage-private-force-retainers-conflict.md)
- [local-order-militia-banditry.md](local-order-militia-banditry.md)
- [campaign-board.md](campaign-board.md)
- [warfare-mobilization-supply-merit.md](warfare-mobilization-supply-merit.md)

Use when:
- the design needs to distinguish pressure, local clash, tactical-lite encounter, and campaign board instead of collapsing all conflict into one warfare layer

### China-Ancient Sandbox Structure

Start with:
- [china-ancient-sandbox-structure.md](china-ancient-sandbox-structure.md)

Usually pair with:
- [ancient-sandbox.md](ancient-sandbox.md)
- [china-map-prefecture-county-routes.md](china-map-prefecture-county-routes.md)
- [public-opinion-reputation-public-spaces.md](public-opinion-reputation-public-spaces.md)
- [module-mapping.md](module-mapping.md)

Use when:
- the user wants the desk sandbox itself structured more clearly instead of only asking for more flavor or more map size

### Wargame Simulation Flow

Start with:
- [wargame-simulation-flow.md](wargame-simulation-flow.md)

Usually pair with:
- [campaign-board.md](campaign-board.md)
- [warfare-mobilization-supply-merit.md](warfare-mobilization-supply-merit.md)
- [military-thought-and-command-culture.md](military-thought-and-command-culture.md)
- [small-clash-vs-major-campaign.md](small-clash-vs-major-campaign.md)

Use when:
- the user wants an explicit step-by-step `bingqi` or warfare resolution sequence

### Force Families and Armed Differentiation

- [force-families-differentiation.md](force-families-differentiation.md)

Usually pair with:
- [lineage-private-force-retainers-conflict.md](lineage-private-force-retainers-conflict.md)

### Material Life and Household Reality

Start with:
- [material-life-clothing-food-housing-travel.md](material-life-clothing-food-housing-travel.md)

Usually pair with:
- [commoner-livelihoods.md](commoner-livelihoods.md)

- one regional pack such as [jiangnan-water-network-county.md](jiangnan-water-network-county.md) or [north-china-road-county.md](north-china-road-county.md)

- the world has social systems but still lacks visible everyday life, dignity, cost, and household texture

### Death Shock Across Scales

### Reproduction and Gendered Continuity

Start with:
- [fertility-demography-infant-mortality.md](fertility-demography-infant-mortality.md)
- [women-life-cycle-gendered-experience.md](women-life-cycle-gendered-experience.md)
